title: agrostis turrialbae
intro: Agrostis turrialbae, also known as the Turrialba bentgrass, is a type of grass native to Central America, particularly in Costa Rica. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Agrostis turrialbae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
